revision_summary: Three targeted fixes required: (1) SCHEMA MISUSE — correct three citation errors: cherry_pick_moments[5] (02:13) should cite bill_collection.alternative_paths.elderly_low_tech_protocol, not coaching_philosophy.energy_match; cherry_pick_moments[3] (03:38) should cite coaching_philosophy.setter_scope_discipline, not coaching_philosophy.bill_anchoring; cherry_pick_moments[6] (03:59) should remove the rebuttals.changed_mind citation (Stage 3 itself acknowledges it's inapplicable) and substitute protocols.hello_objection_not_interested or null. (2) INTERNAL INCONSISTENCY — rep_intent.evidence[2] (02:52) characterizes the cash offer pivot as 'reactive improvisation' while cherry_pick_moments[2] correctly notes 'the path exists' as a legitimate recovery option. Reconcile: the pivot decision is procedurally correct per qualifiers.credit_qualifier; the coaching gap is sequencing/comprehension-checking, not the pivot itself. Remove 'reactive improvisation' framing from rep_intent. (3) MISSED FLIP OPPORTUNITY — add a cherry_pick_moment for ts 03:33-03:38 (Zane's NGO/grant articulation) classified as flip_opportunity per analysis_directives.flip_opportunity_detection. Stage 3 surfaces the misalignment in multi_touch_patterns and cherry_pick_moments[3] but never generates the flip alternative — the core Stewart deliverable the schema requires at this moment. The flip: Zane's 'house owner has nothing to pay' belief is emotionally adjacent to the bill swap value proposition and should be bridged, not just corrected. Optional but recommended: add missed_moment for ts 02:20 ('No. Not yet.') as a vulnerability_disclosure empathy gap per coaching_philosophy.empathy_on_vulnerability_disclosure.
